query:
ALTER TABLE experts 
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS specialties JSON,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS languages VARCHAR(200) DEFAULT '中文',
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS consultationModes JSON,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS socialLinks JSON,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS priceMin INT DEFAULT 0,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS priceMax INT DEFAULT 0;
